text.title: Embedding Applications Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from candidate shortlist to deployed pipeline.

step.name: domain-bench
step.action: Run Recall@10 + MRR with batch size 32–128.

step.name: wire-batched-insertion
step.action: Bind batch_size 256, normalize=true, exponential backoff. Provider-specific params (`input_type` for Cohere, `dimensions` for OpenAI v3).

step.name: wire-metadata-and-schema
step.action: Pin dimension + metric at create. Add per-vector metadata fields (model_name, model_version, created_at).
step.decision-gate: fetch + assert config before any upsert

step.name: quality-gate-and-deploy
step.action: Recall@10 on held-out set > threshold; if yes, promote; else block.
